## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO strategy, content progress, and new opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/dCdBcMzYoA3qSfVMAKNtpytLrJwxLFdA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO efforts showing early traction with rankings for key terms like "best AI role plays platform"](https://fathom.video/share/dCdBcMzYoA3qSfVMAKNtpytLrJwxLFdA?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [New content opportunities identified, including sales roleplay exercises and alternative-based articles](https://fathom.video/share/dCdBcMzYoA3qSfVMAKNtpytLrJwxLFdA?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Exec's existing sales compensation calculator outperforms simpler competitors, presenting opportunity for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/dCdBcMzYoA3qSfVMAKNtpytLrJwxLFdA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Topics

### SEO Progress and New Opportunities

      - [Sales roleplay exercises (keyword difficulty: easy)](https://fathom.video/share/dCdBcMzYoA3qSfVMAKNtpytLrJwxLFdA?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
